en_title: Resident Evil 2 Director Wants Leon to Return for a Cozy Game About His Retirement — And It Sounds Very Different to Resident Evil Requiem
cn_title: 《生化危机：安魂曲》导演神谷英树：想做个里昂退休种田的温馨游戏
subtitle: 神谷的温馨生化梦
opus_summary: 神谷英树提出设想：里昂退休后在乡村钓鱼种菜，远离丧尸。但卡普空正忙于《生化危机：安魂曲》剧情扩展和《代号维罗妮卡》重制，该设想实现可能性不大。

paragraphs.en: Legendary game director Hideki Kamiya has described his vision for a cosy Resident Evil sequel starring Leon S. Kennedy in his retirement, in what would be a bold new direction for the survival horror franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 传奇游戏导演神谷英树描述了他设想中一款以里昂·S·肯尼迪退休生活为主角的温馨《生化危机》续作，这将是这个生存恐怖系列一次大胆的新方向。

paragraphs.en: Kamiya, who directed Leon's introduction to the series in Resident Evil 2, recently made headlines when he was filmed jokingly suggesting that there should be a "non-scary mode" for Resident Evil Requiem , where he could just enjoy the series' puzzles.
paragraphs.cn: 神谷英树曾执导《生化危机2》中里昂的首次登场。他最近因一段视频登上了新闻，片中他半开玩笑地表示《生化危机：安魂曲》应该有「非恐怖模式」，让他能单纯享受系列的解谜乐趣。

paragraphs.en: Now, Kamiya appears to have thought more about this idea — as he has pitched a distinctly non-scary sounding Resident Evil sequel on social media. Responding to a fan who asked if Kamiya could one day develop a new Resident Evil game that tied up the storylines of Leon and Claire Redfield, Kamiya suggested a concept that saw Leon enjoying his latter years with no zombies in sight.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，神谷似乎对这番设想做了更多思考——他在社交媒体上提出了一个听上去毫不恐怖的《生化危机》续作概念。有粉丝问他能否有朝一日开发一款把里昂和克莱尔·雷德菲尔德的故事线收尾的新《生化危机》，神谷则回应了一个里昂安享晚年、见不到一只丧尸的构思。

paragraphs.en: Rather than harpooning mutant crocodiles, Leon would now spend his time quietly fishing for his dinner. Rather than finding Regenerators in the freezer, he would now fix home appliances for his elderly neighbours. And as for zombie canines? The only dog he'd see would be his loyal pet hound.
paragraphs.cn: 里昂不再用鱼叉猎杀变异鳄鱼，而是悠闲地钓鱼准备晚餐。他不再在冷冻库里寻找再生者，而是帮上了年纪的邻居修理家电。至于丧尸犬？他唯一能见到的狗将是自己忠实的宠物猎犬。

paragraphs.en: "If I made it, it'd turn into a game where retired Leon goes fishing in the countryside," Kamiya said of his cozy sequel idea, via a post on X/Twitter.
paragraphs.cn: 「要是我来做，这会变成一款退休里昂去乡下钓鱼的游戏。」神谷在X/Twitter上发帖，如此描述他温馨的续作构想。

paragraphs.en: "Forages for wild veggies, bakes bread, walks the dog, tends a home garden, drives 50 km to the general store for supplies, invites old buddies over for a barbecue, fixes the neighbor grandma's oven at her request, sells homemade lemonade at the local festival... but that'd be cool, right...?"
paragraphs.cn: 「采采野菜、烤烤面包、遛遛狗、打理家庭菜园，开车跑50公里去杂货店采购补给，邀老朋友来家里烧烤，应邻居老奶奶请求帮她修烤箱，在当地节日上卖自制的柠檬水……听着挺不错，对吧……？」

paragraphs.en: I for one would absolutely play that game, but sadly, it's unlikely this is actually what's in store for Leon just yet. Resident Evil Requiem is still due to receive a big story expansion at some point in the future , and fans have a wishlist of things they'd like to see (Ada! Chris! A marriage reveal!) that do not include picking veggies. Still, who knows what Capcom is actually cooking up. And of course, all of this is separate to the recent reveal of Resident Evil: Veronica , which is set to launch at some point in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 我肯定会玩这样一款游戏，但遗憾的是，里昂目前可能还享受不到这种生活。《生化危机：安魂曲》未来仍会推出一个大型剧情扩展，粉丝们也有自己的愿望清单（艾达！克里斯！公布婚讯！），但采摘蔬菜可不在其中。不过，谁知道卡普空究竟在酝酿什么。当然，所有这些都与最近公布的《生化危机：代号维罗妮卡》无关，后者预计于2027年某个时间发售。

paragraphs.en: If you're still negotating Requiem's scarier moments, IGN's Resident Evil: Requiem guide will help you every step of the way through RE9. Take note of these key tips and tricks to stay safe, and focus on finding these important items early . Plus, our comprehensive walkthrough will make sure you don't miss a single Bobblehead or file as you try to survive from the Rhodes Hill Chronic Care Center all the way to Raccoon City.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你仍在努力应对《安魂曲》中那些更恐怖的时刻，IGN的《生化危机：安魂曲》指南会全程陪伴你通关这部《生化危机9》。牢记这些关键生存技巧，并尽早找到这些重要物品。此外，我们的完整流程攻略将确保你在从罗兹山慢性病护理中心一路挣扎到浣熊市的求生之路上，不会错过任何一个摇头娃娃或文件。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或者在Bluesky上找到他。

pending_dict.reason: 生化危机系列敌人，社区普遍使用再生者
